text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Whether it's the dazzling tiara, the valiant chrysanthemum that
represents the final crown...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...Or the honorable autumn shield we're competing for, late autumn is
a lively time when Umamusume and fans alike are in heightened
spirits.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The shrine is carried to the sound of music, a beautiful dance offered
to the Three Goddesses, and arrows released to ward off misfortune...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: This all takes place at the festival for Umamusume, by Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
The Fleetfoot Festival is coming up soon! This year I finally wanna try
the stall that sold the first grilled carrot. I'll have to line up early to
get some before they sell out!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to see the performances the different groups are gonna
put on, too! I wonder which ones Tracen Academy will be in charge of
this year.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Now then. As you are all aware, the Fleetfoot Festival is fast
approaching, and it is an important annual event for us all as
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I have heard word from the URA that Tracen Academy will be in
charge of the ceremonial dance and archery shows this year.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I will now announce the participants for each event. Participation is
optional, but I hope you will rise to this honorable duty.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
First, the ceremonial dance devoted to the Three Goddesses. The
first of three dancers is... Gold City.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: The second dancer is Curren Chan. Finally, the third dancer is...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Hey, for the Fleetfoot Festival, think we can leave the academy early? I really, really wanna get a good spot for the ceremonial dance!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Can you believe we'll get to see City dancing?! Not to mention
Curren! She's always so perfect on stage.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Waaah...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: There's the top model, City, and the real pop'lar influencer Curren...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
They're so glam'rous, I can see why they were chosen to perform an
import'nt dance for the Three Goddesses. But what I don't
understand...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yukino... Yukino? You don't look too well. What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ah, sorry 'bout that! Lemme turn my phone on silent.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, uh, no worries... So um, that was an Umastagram notif'cation,
right? Did someone like your post?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I let everyone know I'll be dancing and asked them to come see
it. It looks like they're looking forward to it, so I'm happy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
You told "everyone"?
So, um... how many likes has it got so far?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: At the moment? Uh... 26,000? Oh, it just turned to 27,000!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
TWENTY-SEVEN THOUSAND?! Y-you only posted ten minutes ago,
didn'tcha?! Eeeek!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
(Oh, City's manager posted too... And it's already got almost 10,000
likes?!)

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
(So many people want t'see City and Curren dance! And I don't blame
'em! That's why it's so gosh darn scary!)

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah! I was thinking we could take a team photo of the three of us
and post it to Umastagram later. That okay with you?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Let's do our best on this ceremonial dance, Yukino!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: O-okey dokeyyyy!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: (Ohhh, I'm in the soup!)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
"I'm looking forward to seeing your beautiful dance." "She's so
stunning, her visuals are insane!" "Please post lots of pictures of your
costume!" Hm...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...I thought so. So that's why I was chosen, huh...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
It is hereby... approved! Please work hard on your preparation trip for
the Fleetfoot Festival!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Expectations! I am eagerly awaiting the Fleetfoot Festival! Of course
there is the beautiful ceremonial dance to look forward to, but also...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Valiance! Symboli Rudolf and Narita Brian. I will most certainly be
there to watch you both show off your mastery of archery!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Director. I am grateful for the honorable appointment,
and I will work diligently to fulfill my role to the fullest.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to the vigorous efforts of the Umamusume, there has been
tremendous excitement in the racing world recently.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That's why I believe that our duty to pray for their growth and safety
at the Fleetfoot Festival is even more pertinent this year than ever.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
With that being said, I can say with absolute certainty that we will rise
to the occasion.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Please expect great things, Director. I hereby pledge to make this
year's Fleetfoot Festival a success like none other!
